scripts.build: rimraf ./lib && yarn build-esm && yarn build-cjs && yarn copy-to-lib && yarn dual-package
scripts.build-esm: echo "compiling ESM" && rimraf ./lib/esm && yarn tsc -p tsconfig-esm.json
scripts.build-cjs: echo "compiling CJS" && rimraf ./lib/cjs && yarn tsc -p tsconfig-cjs.json
scripts.copy-to-lib: echo 'copying CSS + JSON assets to lib folder' && yarn copyfiles -u 1 'src/**/*.css' 'src/**/*.json' lib/esm && yarn copyfiles -u 1 'src/**/*.css' 'src/**/*.json' lib/cjs
scripts.dual-package: echo 'adding package.json to each lib folder for dual output support' && yarn tsconfig-to-dual-package ./tsconfig-cjs.json ./tsconfig-esm.json
